prompt: A photorealistic scene of a massive metallic rocket hovering horizontally at a very low altitude over a {argument name="setting" default="residential neighborhood with palm trees"}. The side of the silver spacecraft clearly displays the text {argument name="company name" default="SPACEX"}. Bright orange flames and thick smoke erupt from the rear engines. The foreground features a dark concrete rooftop, while the background shows small multi-story buildings nestled among tropical vegetation under hazy {argument name="lighting" default="sunset"} lighting, creating a surreal juxtaposition of advanced aerospace technology and everyday life.
translatedPrompt: 一张写实风格的场景图，展示了一枚巨大的金属火箭在 {argument name="setting" default="种有棕榈树的住宅区"} 上方极低的高度水平悬停。银色航天器的侧面清晰地显示着 {argument name="company name" default="SPACEX"} 字样。尾部引擎喷射出明亮的橙色火焰和浓烟。前景是深色的混凝土屋顶，背景是在朦胧的 {argument name="lighting" default="日落"} 光线下，掩映在热带植被中的小型多层建筑，营造出先进航天科技与日常生活之间超现实的并置感。

breakdown.creativeCore: 低空悬停在社区上空的航天器：生成一张巨大的火箭水平悬停在住宅区上空的写实图像，适用于超现实科幻概念设计。
breakdown.subject: 界面
constraints: 过度真实导致细节瑕疵显眼
breakdown.bestUse: 直播带货界面、社交电商、移动端商品页

analysis.copyTemplate:
Create a UI/界面 image for [用途/受众].

Main subject:
[主体]，[数量/状态/动作]，[关键外观/材质/身份]。

Scene:
[地点/环境]，[时间/天气/时代]，[背景元素]。

Composition:
[参考构图: horizontal]。

Visual style:
[参考风格: realistic, photorealistic]。

Lighting and camera:
[光线/镜头/景深/质感]。

Text requirements:
包含文字或排版元素。

Quality constraints:
clean, coherent, polished, readable hierarchy, no random text, no visual clutter.
